title: The Lucas
description: Horror mod for a Lucas. Sometimes the mob appears far from the player and watches him
body:
Horror mod for a Lucas. At the beginning of the game and in creative mode, he will not be spawning, for this you need to build a totem. Sometimes the mob appears far from the player and watches him, while the larger the acivity of player, the more the spawning will be activated Lucas himself.

The totem must be created with his face to the west and at the last step you need to install a sign, if it does not work - try to install a sign on the other side, and if the totem disappears, then congratulations, you summon Lucas.

If you wanted to get rid of Lucas, you need to build the same totem a 2nd time, and if the totem disappears, Lucas will disappear.
